title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
description: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
description: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.

title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
description: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

title: Adyen to buy Orb for $335M
description: The Dutch payments processor is swallowing the San Francisco startup as both adapt their businesses to the age of artificial intelligence.

title: Payments entrepreneur strikes again
description: The former CEO of CardX is pitching a new artificial intelligence tool designed to let merchants automate chargebacks.

title: Pinterest signs $4B AI deal with AWS
description: The largest in Pinterest’s history, the deal will make discovery more personal, visual and actionable, according to CTO Matt Madrigal.

title: The Shelf Is a Battlefield: Designing Products That Get Picked Up
description:
Sponsor content is created on behalf of and in collaboration with Bazoom by DigitalCommerce360. Our editorial staff is not involved in the creation of the sponsored content. In order to get their products picked up, a brand’s packaging needs to be able to grab attention from 10 feet away, portray its value at 5 feet […]
The post The Shelf Is a Battlefield: Designing Products That Get Picked Up appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
description: Google DeepMind is funding research into the potential dangers of situations where millions of different AI agents interact with each other online. According to Rohin Shah, who directs the company’s AGI safety and alignment research, the mass-market arrival of agents that can carry out tasks without human oversight and follow instructions given to them by other…

title: Sir Martin Sorrell Sees No Easy Exit for Holding Companies
description: Accenture should buy WPP and more insights from the S4 Capital executive chairman.

title: [AINews] Open Models, Model Labs vs Agent Labs, and What's Untrainable — Sarah Guo
description: a quiet day lets us reflect on a great essay

title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
description: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
description: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

title: AI's Hidden Energy Bill: Why Visibility is Becoming Critical for Enterprises
description: Energy consumption is becoming an important factor in AI investment, governance and sustainability decisions in the U.K.

title: Neura Robotics Raises $1.4B for Physical AI
description: Funding from investors including Nvidia, Amazon and Qualcomm will support the vendor’s development of humanoid robots and physical AI.
